name: Tomatilla Green Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 whole serrano pepper, green, seeded and chopped
5 whole ancho chiles, green, seeded and chopped
2 whole habanero chili pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the skin off the tomatillos and wash off any sticky residue.
2. Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C).
3. Place washed tomatillos in a pan and cook for 15 minutes.
4. Cool the tomatillos, then blend them until smooth.
5. In a separate pot, sauté the remaining ingredients (onion, garlic, ancho chiles, habanero chili pepper) in olive oil and water until fragrant, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Add the blended tomatillo mixture to the pot with the other sautéed ingredients.
7. Simmer the sauce for approximately 30 minutes.
8. The sauce can be served as is or blended further to achieve a smoother consistency.
